articles.title: Czechia 1-1 South Africa (Jun 18, 2026) Game Analysis - ESPN
articles.description: Expert recap and game analysis of the Czechia vs. South Africa Fifa World Cup game from June 18, 2026 on ESPN.
articles.content:
A late penalty from Teboho Mokoena secured South Africa a 1-1 draw with the Czechia in Atalanta, which keeps alive both sides' hopes of qualification from Group A.
